member_descriptions: dark red wooden barstool chair with leather seat
light wood tabletop with dark base
white-faced wall clock with scalloped rim
stainless-steel drip coffee maker, partial crop
dark brown wooden cabinet door edge-cropped
edge-cropped dark brown leather couch arm
dark recessed wooden cabinet door edge-cropped
dark wooden cabinet panels, edge crop
white painted mantel with black firebox
white round clock with Roman numerals
dark brown leather recliner, left crop
white wooden mantel with black firebox
member_long_descriptions: Front-facing stainless-steel side-by-side refrigerator with two vertical dark handles, reflective/smudged surface and minor dents; appears close to camera (approximately 1.5 m away) and shown mostly full-height and centered in the crop.

Vertical rectangular brown wooden picture frame with a thin gold inner trim containing a colorful beach-themed print (blue sky, sea and a bird); glass-covered and intact, shown in a narrow edge-cropped vertical crop (top/bottom or sides partially cut off), likely wall-mounted and approximately 1.5 m from the camera.

Dark brown stained wooden cabinet door with a single recessed rectangular panel and low-sheen finish, vertical orientation; appears slightly edge-cropped on the left and photographed at close range (~0.8 m from camera).

Glossy dark red/brown wooden barstool-style chair with a round padded black leather seat, carved ornate backrest and turned legs with a circular footrest; slightly edge-cropped at the top/left and photographed close to the camera (about 1.0 m away).

Glossy dark red-brown carved wooden chair with ornate openwork backrest and vertical slats; seat area is partly visible with deep shadow and the top/sides are edge-cropped (partial) in the image — approximately 0.6 m from the camera.

Partial, edge-cropped dining table/island with a light varnished wood live-edge rectangular tabletop and a dark brown paneled vertical base; a small potted plant sits on the surface and an electrical outlet is visible on the base side; smooth/varnished finish, chairs are partially visible at the left; appears close to the camera (approx. 1.2 m away).

Close-up partial view of a dark brown painted wooden raised-panel two-door cabinet with a central vertical seam, visible wood grain and slightly worn/scuffed finish; the image is edge-cropped and the cabinet appears about 0.8 m from the camera.

Dark brown wooden tall cabinet with vertical recessed-panel doors and a slim vertical metal handle; the unit appears flush against the wall and is partially cut off at the right edge of the crop (approx. 1.5 m from camera).

Dark stained wooden base kitchen cabinet with recessed paneled doors and a glossy finish, lower front shows a small chip/tear and the left side is edge-cropped by the image; countertop overhang is visible above — approximately 0.8 m from the camera.

Wall-mounted round clock with a white face, black Roman numerals and black hour/minute hands set in a dark glossy scalloped (wavy) frame; shown at an oblique angle and slightly edge-cropped, estimated ~1.5 m from camera.

Partial, edge-cropped glossy black coffee maker with a rounded front, reflective chrome ring at the top and a small blue-lit rectangular panel on the front; appears to be a compact countertop single-cup unit made of glossy plastic and metal, photographed from close range (≈0.5 m).

Partial dark brown wooden dining chair with a light beige upholstered seat cushion and carved vertical backrest slats; front and lower portions are edge-cropped in the image and the chair appears close to the camera (approx. 0.8 m).

Partial edge-cropped brown wooden cabinet front showing vertical recessed panels and a lighter wood or laminate top edge with glossy varnish and visible grain; appears close to camera (approximately 0.8 m away).

Partial view of a dark mahogany/brown wooden cabinet front with a glossy, slightly reflective finish and simple rectangular face panels; lower portion is visible and cut off by the image edge, appearing about 1–2 meters from the camera.

Partial view of a compact stainless-steel and black-plastic drip coffee maker with a visible glass carafe and handle on the warmer plate; front-right of the unit is cut off by the image edge, metallic surfaces show reflections, and no illuminated indicators are visible — estimated distance ≈ 1.0 m from the camera.

Varnished dark-brown wooden cabinet door filling most of the crop, with a recessed rectangular center panel, vertical wood grain and a glossy finish showing subtle reflections; small metallic knob or reflective spot near the lower center is visible; appears intact and was likely photographed from roughly 1.0 m.

White plastic rectangular wall outlet faceplate, vertical orientation, right edge partially cropped; two faint circular socket openings visible and surface shows light smudges or pale green marks, image is low-resolution and slightly blurred — estimated ~0.5 m from camera.

Dark brown wooden cabinet/closet door with vertical wood grain and a recessed rectangular center panel; the upper portion is partially cut off by an overhead lamp and the crop is edge-cropped, slightly low-resolution/blurred, with no visible hardware and appears tall and close to the camera (approx. 0.8 m).

Partial, edge-cropped dark wooden cabinet panel with glossy finish and visible vertical grain/panel lines; a lighter wooden baseboard or trim is visible at the bottom of the crop; dim lighting and slight surface reflections suggest the object is close to the camera (approx. 0.8 m).

Close-up of a dark brown wooden cabinet door with a recessed rectangular panel and a narrow vertical groove/handle at the left; surface shows worn, scuffed painted finish and uneven discoloration in dim lighting, and the image crop cuts off parts of the frame indicating the object is partially visible — approximately 0.8 m from the camera.

Partial, edge-cropped dark brown leather couch showing a padded armrest/console and adjacent two-seat cushions with vertical seamed stitching and a slight glossy worn finish; a small remote or device sits on the armrest and a wooden side table is visible at the lower right—approximately 1.2 m from the camera.

Circular wall clock with a dark glossy scalloped frame and white face showing black Roman numerals and black hour/minute hands; glass-covered dial, slightly blurred/pixelated in the image, fully visible and intact — estimated diameter ~30–35 cm and photographed from about 1.5 m away.

Small dark-brown wooden side table with a turned leg and rounded tabletop visible in the crop; top holds stacked books and a draped cloth, base shows scuffs and wear; object is partially edge-cropped and occluded by items, and appears close to the camera (estimated ~0.8 m away).

Close-up of a dark brown wooden side table with a rectangular top and turned legs, visible lower shelf holding a woven basketlike object; wood finish looks scuffed/worn and the right side is edge-cropped in the image; appears approximately 0.8 m from the camera.

Partial crop showing the corner of a dark-stained wooden side table: rectangular top edge and a molded square leg are visible, with worn/scuffed finish on the top; object is close to the camera and cut off by the image edge (approx. 0.6 m away).

Edge-cropped dark brown wooden side table with a rectangular top and thick square legs, scuffed/worn finish and visible clutter (books) on the tabletop; partial view shows underside and one leg, likely a low-height table approximately 0.8 m from the camera.

Brown leather recliner with tufted high back, padded armrests and visible side recline lever; glossy, worn leather with creases and small scuffs, upright position and slightly cropped at the right edge — estimated distance ~1.2 m from camera.

Close-up of a red-painted wooden chair back with ornate pierced/carved circular motifs and visible turned legs; glossy finish shows paint chips and wear at the top edge, and the object is edge-cropped and partial, approximately 0.7 m from the camera.

Front-facing stainless-steel microwave with large dark glass door and horizontal handle, right-side electronic control panel with buttons and knob, interior light on and reflective metal finish; fully visible and appears mounted in place (approx. 1.2 m from camera).

Close-up, front-facing brown enamel oven showing the upper oven door with a rectangular glass window and a white printed kitchen towel draped over the horizontal handle; a lower storage drawer is visible beneath and the metal finish shows scuffs and wear, the crop is partially edge-cut and the oven appears photographed at roughly 0.8 m from the camera.

Partial right-edge view of a dark reddish-brown wooden side table with a rectangular, cabinet-like form, paneled front and molded base; glossy finish with visible scuffs and light wear, edge-cropped in the image and positioned next to a tufted leather armchair — appears roughly 0.8 m from the camera.

Tall dark brown/near-black wooden cabinet door with recessed rectangular panels and a narrow frame, occupying most of the crop; a vertical handle is visible near the right mid-edge and the upper-left portion is partially occluded by a light fixture; surface appears matte with subtle wood grain; approximate distance ~1.2 m from camera.

Tall, dark brown stained wooden two-door cabinet with vertical recessed panels and a visible center seam; small horizontal black pull near the upper area, matte finish with minor scuffing; mostly visible but edge-cropped on the left and partially cropped on the right by adjacent shelving — appears approximately 1.5 meters from the camera.

Close-up of a dark brown stained wooden cabinet door with a recessed central panel and a narrow top drawer fascia; matte finish, minor edge wear/scuffing visible, no hardware shown, and the crop is vertically edge-trimmed — photographed at approximately 0.6 meters from the camera.

Partial close-up of a dark brown stained wooden cabinet showing three recessed rectangular panel doors with a varnished sheen and narrow horizontal metal handles near the top of the panels; the lower portion is cut off by the image edge and the finish shows slight surface wear and grain variation — estimated distance about 1.2 m from camera.

Tall, narrow dark-brown wooden cabinet door with a single recessed rectangular panel and molded frame, semi-matte finish with minor scuffs near the bottom; the right edge is cropped and the door appears within about 0.8 m of the camera.

White painted wooden mantel with rectangular decorative paneling and a black metal firebox insert; the firebox interior is a dark rectangular void with a gray folded fabric or cover partially visible on the hearth floor, and the mantel surround appears fully visible in the crop — approximate distance from camera ~2.0 meters.

Front-facing, partially edge-cropped black/charcoal plastic drip coffee maker with a clear glass carafe and visible handle; metallic top band and small control panel/buttons are visible — appears close to camera (approximately 0.8 m).

Rectangular black metal fireplace insert with a matte surround and a dark, mostly empty interior revealing a partial curved gas log or burner; front trim shows soot and scuff marks and the top edge of the surround appears slightly cropped in the image; approximate distance to camera ~1.5 meters.

Partial black coffee maker with stainless-steel accents and a glossy plastic body; a glass carafe is visible at the lower right of the crop, compact countertop unit approximately 0.6 m from the camera.

Partial, vertical dark charcoal cylindrical side-table column with a slightly flared top rim and matte painted or ceramic surface; the object is edge-cropped on the left and bottom of the crop, sitting on the floor and appearing close to the camera (approx. 0.6 m away).

Partial/edge-cropped view of a dark-stained wooden side table with two tiers; ornate curved legs, a lower shelf holding a woven basket, and small decorative objects on the top surface are visible; appears scuffed and medium-sized, roughly 1.2 meters from the camera.

Three-seat dark brown leather couch with padded, stitched cushions and a tufted back; visible reclining seams and wide padded armrests; mostly visible in the crop with a slight left-edge cut-off; appears to be approximately 2.0 meters from the camera.

Partial close-up of a white-faced circular wall clock showing black Roman numerals and black hour/minute hands, silver-ish rim with visible glare and edge cropping at lower-left; image is slightly blurred/low-resolution and the clock appears roughly 0.8 m from the camera.

Partial, edge-cropped dark mahogany wooden side table with a glossy finish; visible rectangular top and a small central drawer with a brass knob, tabletop holds cropped items; appears bedside-sized and photographed at approximately 0.8 meters from the camera.

Dark brown leather recliner-style couch shown in a left-edge crop; visible padded back cushion, prominent armrest and a reclining lever on the side with worn creased upholstery and stitching details — partial/cropped view, photographed at approximately 1.5 m from the camera.

Close-up view (approx. 1.0 m) of a dark brown leather recliner shown in left-side profile; the crop is partial/edge-cropped and includes the padded armrest, sagging seat cushion, creased/wrinkled leather surface and a visible reclining lever on the side. Backrest shows horizontal seam lines and the leather appears worn with surface wrinkles and soft cushioning; chair is angled slightly away from the camera.

Partial close-up of a dark-gray painted fireplace surround with a recessed rectangular firebox opening; interior appears empty and black, surround shows painted texture with slight wear, mantel edge and small objects visible at top-left, and the crop is edge-cut at lower-left. Approximate camera distance ~1.5 m.

White painted wooden mantel and surround with rectangular black firebox opening and raised-panel molding; mantel shelf holds small objects and the lower opening is dark/unlit, partially occluded by a low table and chair in the foreground, mostly intact and edge-visible — approximately 1.5 m from camera.
clusters.representative_description: Partial view of a dark mahogany/brown wooden cabinet front with a glossy, slightly reflective finish and simple rectangular face panels; lower portion is visible and cut off by the image edge, appearing about 1–2 meters from the camera.

member_long_descriptions: Partial white metal wire pantry shelving with multiple horizontal tiers holding assorted packaged food, containers, and jars; visible through a doorway at the right edge of the crop and cut off by the image border, with some areas slightly blurred — approximate distance from camera ~1.5 m.
clusters.representative_description: Partial white metal wire pantry shelving with multiple horizontal tiers holding assorted packaged food, containers, and jars; visible through a doorway at the right edge of the crop and cut off by the image border, with some areas slightly blurred — approximate distance from camera ~1.5 m.

member_long_descriptions: Cream/white pleated fabric shade sitting on a faceted clear glass column base with a metallic socket/rim; lamp appears unlit and the bottom is slightly cropped by the image edge, approximate distance ~0.6 m from camera.
clusters.representative_description: Cream/white pleated fabric shade sitting on a faceted clear glass column base with a metallic socket/rim; lamp appears unlit and the bottom is slightly cropped by the image edge, approximate distance ~0.6 m from camera.
